items.title: Michael Jackson Bad World Tour 1988 Black and White Splatter T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: michael, jackson, bad, world, tour, 1988, black, white, splatter. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
